description: Rocket.Chat is open at the login screen. Log in with Username: admin and Password: Admin1234!. A 'Software Developer' on your team reported that CI build notifications stopped appearing after the team migrated from '#legacy-builds' to the new '#build-alerts' channel. Fix the "CI Notification Bot" incoming webhook by updating its target channel to "#build-alerts" and changing the "Post as" user to "build-bot". Verify the integration is functional by sending a test JSON payload to the webhook URL and confirming the message appears in the #build-alerts channel.
